prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as it discusses recruitment practices and resources for school governors and academy trustees which are directly relevant to the education system in England, including references to services provided by the Department for Education (DfE) and specific guidance applicable to English schools and academy trusts.
